keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Keithroy Freeman (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal!  St. Kitts And Nevis 0, Guadeloupe 1. Luther Archimède (Guadeloupe) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Ange-Freddy Plumain with a through ball   following a fast break.
Anthony Baron (Guadeloupe) is shown the yellow card.
Kalonji Clarke (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card.
